rust.name: active_mask
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the current warp's active-lane mask has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.12 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: activemask

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.activemask() declaration
stages.detail: LLVM recognized the declaration and preserved its convergent, nocallback, side-effect, and inaccessible-memory contract.

stages.representation: typed zero-operand activemask call
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted activemask.b32 at the imported instruction floor.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR convergent side-effecting inline PTX activemask.b32 with =r and ~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained exact activemask.b32 PTX and produced 1,812-byte LTOIR from the reviewed probe source (SHA-256 d98ba219074ef5b6b866e18ecff76c8aa6f35d31409cfd4af5b30e07ccd673b8).

stages.representation: retained legacy-NVVM kernel storing the inline activemask result
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 2,856-byte cubin (SHA-256 d2b3a14122744f1685f4042a7f8653d6bb8d33bf03b540c54bab7da799196557); cuobjdump showed the expected VOTE.ANY active-mask implementation and global result store.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the lanes active at this instruction in the current warp.
Returns true when every named warp lane has a true predicate.
Returns true when at least one named warp lane has a true predicate.
Returns a mask of named warp lanes whose predicates are true.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.11 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: match.sync

intrinsics.summary: Returns the named non-exited warp lanes when every 64-bit value agrees, otherwise zero.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.11 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: match.sync

intrinsics.summary: Returns the named non-exited warp lanes when every 32-bit value agrees, otherwise zero.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.11 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: match.sync

intrinsics.summary: Returns the named warp lanes whose 64-bit value equals this lane's value.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.11 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: match.sync

intrinsics.summary: Returns the named warp lanes whose 32-bit value equals this lane's value.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.13.1.1 Atomic reduction and atomic operations: atom

stages.representation: side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.bf16x2 with =r,l,r,~{memory}
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted the exact native packed bf16x2 global atomic-add instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the selected Rust LLVM packed-atomic probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the exact bf16x2 inline-PTX instruction for sm_90.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.bf16x2 with =r,l,r,~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact native bf16x2 inline-PTX route at compute_90.

stages.representation: retained cuda-oxide packed_atomic_add kernel containing side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.bf16x2
stages.detail: cargo oxide emit-ltoir produced 2,760-byte compute_90 LTOIR; link_ltoir -arch=sm_90 produced a 3,968-byte cubin; cuobjdump -sass showed ATOMG.E.ADD.BF16x2.RN.STRONG.GPU (and the sibling F16x2 instruction).

intrinsics.summary: Atomically adds two packed bf16 lanes in global memory and returns the two independently observed old lane values.

intrinsics.summary: Atomically adds two packed f16 lanes in global memory and returns the two independently observed old lane values.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, adds their 32-bit values modulo 2^32, and broadcasts the result to each participating lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, reduces their 32-bit values with bitwise AND, and broadcasts the result.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, selects their signed 32-bit maximum, and broadcasts it to each participating lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, selects their unsigned 32-bit maximum, and broadcasts it to each participating lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, selects their signed 32-bit minimum, and broadcasts it to each participating lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, selects their unsigned 32-bit minimum, and broadcasts it to each participating lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, reduces their 32-bit values with bitwise OR, and broadcasts the result.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.13 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: redux.sync

intrinsics.summary: Synchronizes the named warp lanes, reduces their 32-bit values with bitwise XOR, and broadcasts the result.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.9.6 Data Movement and Conversion Instructions: shfl.sync

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32(i32, f32, i32, i32) declaration
stages.detail: LLVM recognized the declaration and preserved its convergent, nocallback, and inaccessible-memory attributes.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 calls with register and immediate lane and member-mask operands
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted all four reachable shfl.sync.down.b32 operand forms with the fixed clamp.

stages.representation: PTX 6.0 containing all four reachable shfl.sync.down.b32 operand forms
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted every generated register and immediate form.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 declaration before cuda-oxide legacy-NVVM legalization
stages.detail: The pinned LLVM 22 probe independently established the modern typed declaration's convergent, nocallback, and inaccessible-memory attributes before cuda-oxide legalized it for libNVVM.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 call legalized to the legacy aggregate shuffle intrinsic
stages.detail: CUDA-oxide rewrote the modern typed call to libNVVM's legacy aggregate shuffle intrinsic, preserving the mode, value bits, lane or delta, and fixed clamp. CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted that IR and produced LTOIR.

stages.representation: generated-intrinsics kernel containing all eight typed synchronized shuffle calls
stages.detail: libNVVM produced 5,944-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 bb1bd56ee46b4bce228e99e2e2cfac099d39a64c497c0a1cf87615dbf294c7be); nvJitLink produced a 5,160-byte cubin (SHA-256 ce2b2ca9ac1d39f4833c0549a743a238db490d820a6bc8f5f51a9fa89be77a38); cuobjdump showed two SHFL.IDX, SHFL.BFLY, SHFL.DOWN, and SHFL.UP instructions.

intrinsics.summary: Read an f32 value from a higher named warp lane.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.9.6 Data Movement and Conversion Instructions: shfl.sync

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.1 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: bar, barrier

stages.representation: typed intrinsic llvm.nvvm.barrier.cta.sync.aligned.all(i32)
stages.detail: LLVM recognized the declaration and added convergent and nocallback attributes.

stages.representation: typed barrier call with fixed ID 0
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted exact bar.sync 0 PTX at its oldest supported target profile.

stages.representation: PTX 3.2 containing bar.sync 0
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the emitted PTX when assembled for its supported sm_75 floor.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR convergent side-effecting inline PTX bar.sync 0 with ~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact inline-PTX route at compute_75 and produced 1,656-byte LTOIR using its PTX 9.3 profile.

stages.representation: retained legacy-NVVM kernel containing convergent side-effecting bar.sync 0 inline PTX
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 2,856-byte cubin; cuobjdump showed BAR.SYNC 0x0.

intrinsics.summary: Waits until every active thread in the CTA reaches the same barrier, then makes their earlier memory accesses visible to the CTA.

rust.name: thread_idx_x
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only thread-index register has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the X thread index within the current cooperative thread array (CTA).

rust.name: thread_idx_y
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only thread Y index has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the Y thread index within the current cooperative thread array (CTA).

rust.name: thread_idx_z
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only thread Z index has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the Z thread index within the current cooperative thread array (CTA).
Returns true when every named warp lane has the same predicate.
